tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a mildly decreased total carbon dioxide, which may suggest a mild metabolic acidosis or compensated respiratory alkalosis. No evidence of renal dysfunction or hyperglycemia. Clinical correlation is recommended to assess for possible underlying causes of low CO₂.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civico Renzetti Lanciano
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
